HeadComp.title: Tawk.to vs MSG91 | Compare Live Chat & Omnichannel Platforms
HeadComp.description: Compare MSG91 Hello (Live Chat) and tawk.to for agents, video and voice, AI features, widget customization, chatbots, and omnichannel support — so you can choose the right platform for your business.

CompareBannerComp.heading: MSG91 vs Tawk.to
CompareBannerComp.subheading: MSG91 and Tawk.to both help businesses connect with customers, but they serve very different needs. While Tawk.to focuses on providing a simple and free live chat solution for websites, MSG91 offers a complete omnichannel communication platform that goes beyond chat — enabling businesses to engage customers across WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Voice, and more. For businesses that only need basic website chat, Tawk.to can be a starting point. However, for those looking to automate conversations, manage multi-channel communication, and drive conversions through structured engagement, MSG91 provides a more scalable and comprehensive solution.

content.name: MSG91
content.des: MSG91 is a full-stack communication platform designed to manage the entire customer journey — from lead capture to conversion and support. It combines WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Voice, and chat into a single system with advanced automation, chatbot capabilities, CRM integrations, and campaign management. This enables businesses to respond instantly, automate follow-ups, and improve customer engagement at scale.

content.name: Tawk.to
content.des: Tawk.to, on the other hand, is primarily a live chat tool focused on website-based conversations. It is useful for real-time interaction with visitors but lacks deeper automation, multi-channel capabilities, and structured engagement workflows required for scaling customer communication. For growing businesses, the difference lies in capability — while Tawk.to helps you chat with visitors, MSG91 helps you convert, engage, and retain customers across the entire lifecycle.

PreFooterComp.content: Start building your ideal customer engagement experience
